Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 17 

BENE_INCM_RNG_CD 

LABEL: Beneficiary Income 

DESCRIPTION: Beneficiary income range code. 

LONG NAME: BENE_INCM_RNG_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 1 = Less than $10,000 
2 = $10,000 - $14,999 
3 = $15,000 - $19,999 
4 = $20,000 - $24,999 
5 = $25,000 - $34,999 
6 = $35,000 - $49,999 
7 = $50,000 - $74,999 
8 = $75,000 or more 
Missing 

COMMENT:
